title: Revolutionaries and Blackbeard Move After Dressrosa
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on revolutionaries and blackbeard move after dressrosa within the Zou and the Ripples of Dressrosa storyline.
scene: The story cuts between Zou, the Revolutionary Army, Blackbeard's crew, Buggy's organization, and the Straw Hats climbing the giant elephant.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Dragon-san ...it seems across the world...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Rebel Armies are emerging victorious in their fights!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looks like the downfall of the Donquixote family has definitely had an effect...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's difficult to believe that this many different countries were involved in illicit arms trade... the tide of battle is sure to turn.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: revolutionary army General Commander Monkey D. Dragon

dialogue.speaker: Dragon
dialogue.text: But make sure to tell them to not lose their cool now that victory's in sight! The world government will not sit idly by and watch this all unfold...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: CIPHER POL's also gotten much stronger in recent years... tell them to be mindful.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Roger!-

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Dragon- San!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The weapons we brought back from Dressrosa

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: contain traces of a special mineral!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Mineral?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Have you ever heard of liquor?*

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's only a few countries that actually mine it, so perhaps...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can use this information to get closer to the Mastermind behind the manufacture of all these weapons!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That's Defini- rely some valuable intel.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You brought back our friends that had disappeared on Dressrosa, too...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Excellent work recently, I really must say.

dialogue.speaker: Koala
dialogue.text: Ehehe, well... Sabo-kun and Luffy-kun were there too, and...

dialogue.speaker: Koala
dialogue.text: How was Robin?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess the Intel we received about her capture on Sabaody turned out to be false.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Yep! She's doing great! But,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Aren't you going to ask about Luffy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Ah, man... I'm full.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah... er... SABO already told me about Luffy.

dialogue.speaker: Koala
dialogue.text: Anyway, Koala. Do me a favor.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Yes!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We're going to need their strength.

dialogue.speaker: Dragon
dialogue.text: Summon the leaders of all the revolutionary armies scattered across the globe!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sure thi- wait, what!!? Do you really want to gather that lot in one place again!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: New World a certain sea

dialogue.speaker: Laffitte
dialogue.text: Lafitte speaking.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I’m

dialogue.speaker: Jesus Burgess
dialogue.text: Burgess! Is that you?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We stopped by Dressrosa but it appeared as though you'd already left.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Yeah. My bad.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fufu... so that bastard's still alive and kickin', eh?

dialogue.speaker: Shiryu
dialogue.text: Yonkou black- beard pirate crew second ship captain SHIRYU OF THE RAIN

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was completely passed out... couldn't make contact.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: So then... mind telling us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Your exact location?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: now... it's all white. Kinda like a pure white island.

dialogue.speaker: Jesus Burgess
dialogue.text: i stowed away on a certain ship...

dialogue.speaker: Jesus Burgess
dialogue.text: Tell Captain Teach... Tell him to bring everyone and attack my current location... We can get our hands on a huge stockpile of weapons here...

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: It's Admiral teach. How many times must I tell you?

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: Don't forget to drag Doc Q's ass with you. I'm hanging on by a thread over here.

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: Goddann it burgers, spit it out! Where the hell are you!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I dunno the name of the place... I don't think anyone even knows it's here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Just follow my Vivre card.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: All I do know is... Dragon and that vile SABO are both here!

dialogue.speaker: Dragon
dialogue.text: I found it, boys! The general head- quarters of the revolutionary army!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: uhah ahah!

summary: Revolutionaries and Blackbeard Move After Dressrosa: The Straw Hats reach the giant elephant Zou while the Revolutionary Army, Blackbeard Pirates, and Buggy's organization all react to the fall of Doflamingo.
